problem id: 0f1bc0ff
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  00100100 -> 01000001
  11010110 -> 01100110
  10101101 -> 11010101
  00100101 -> 01010001
  10011111 -> 11110100
  00111101 -> 11010001
  00100000 -> 00000001
  00110010 -> 00100001

query: 10010110
predicted answer: 01100100
